description: Evolve the World database schema to support economic analysis using MySQL Workbench (localhost, user: ga, password: password123). Modify the country table to include STORED generated columns gdp_per_capita (DECIMAL 12,2) calculated as GNP * 1000000 / NULLIF(Population, 0) and population_density (DECIMAL 10,2) calculated as Population / NULLIF(SurfaceArea, 0). Create and populate a continent_stats table (PK: continent) with aggregated metrics for country_count, total_population, avg_life_expectancy, total_gnp, and avg_gdp_per_capita. Implement a stored function fn_classify_development that categorizes GDP per capita into 'Unknown' (<=0 or NULL), 'Low' (<=1000), 'Lower-Middle' (<=5000), 'Upper-Middle' (<=15000), or 'High' (>15000). Define a view v_country_development_profile that combines country details with the development classification, ordered by GDP per capita descending, and export the view data to /home/ga/Documents/exports/country_development_profile.csv.
